name: Send Native RUSD on Testnet
query: Send 0.001 RUSD to 0x742d35Cc6634C0532925a3b844Bc9e7595f2bD68 on Radius testnet and confirm if it succeeded.
context: User wants a simple native transfer and confirmation flow. RADIUS_PRIVATE_KEY is set in environment.
expected_behavior: Chooses a valid general-tooling path (cast, web3.py, or viem)
Uses testnet RPC and chain defaults unless overridden
Treats RUSD as native token transfer (not ERC-20 transfer)
Converts 0.001 RUSD to 1000000000000000 wei for transaction value
Submits transaction and waits for receipt
Returns tx hash and explorer URL
Does not require radius-wallet-py or radius-wallet-ts
success_criteria: Native send path is used correctly
Wei conversion is correct for 0.001 RUSD
Success/failure is reported based on receipt status
Private key is never printed or embedded in output
No mandatory Radius wallet wrapper dependency appears
